title: Hotbar Tap
description: Allows to cycle hotbar through inventory.
body:
🎮 Hotbar Tap
> Say goodbye to inventory juggling! Hotbar Tap lets you seamlessly cycle your hotbar through your entire inventory with a simple key press. No more opening menus mid-fight or mid-build—just tap and keep going.

> Whether you're deep in a cave, in the middle of a PvP skirmish, or building sky-high towers, this mod gives you fast, uninterrupted access to every item you’re carrying.

⚙️ Key Features

- Instantly cycle through your inventory via the hotbar

- Customizable keybinds for smooth integration

- Lightweight, client-side and compatible with most modpacks

🧠 _Perfect for builders, adventurers, redstoners, and everyone else._
